intent: Redistribute pipette tips from a full 96-well tip rack to two empty tip racks, placing tips only in rows A, C, E, and G (columns 1-12) to create 24-well spacing compatible with multichannel pipette operations on 24-well plates. Execute tip transfer using pick_up_tip() and drop_tip() functions across specified target wells.

output_schema.protocol_name: Utility: Rearrange pipette tips for 24-well spacing
output_schema.author: Tim Fallon <tfallon@ucsd.edu>
